ground_truth: Two side-by-side photographs of the SAME massage therapist (same person in both). Left: posing on a massage chair. Right: sitting on a massage table with accessories for Thai bamboo stick massages. Bamboo visible.

key_hits: correctly identifies diptych of two side-by-side photos
correctly identifies the SAME man in both photos
correctly identifies massage chair/stool on left and treatment/massage table on right
correctly identifies wooden massage rollers in right photo
describes therapist attire (green t-shirt, black pants) consistently
identifies clinic/therapy setting
key_misses: does not mention bamboo or Thai bamboo stick massages
calls left a 'stool' rather than a massage chair (headrest frame visible)
does not identify the subject as a massage therapist specifically
misses Thai massage context entirely
hallucinations: calls brown/orange cloth a 'patterned throw blanket' over his lap when it appears draped over equipment
judgments.justification: Solid structural description of the diptych and correctly identifies same person and key equipment (chair vs table, rollers), but misses the Thai bamboo stick massage context entirely and labels the left seating as a stool rather than a massage chair.

key_hits: correctly identifies diptych with same man in both panels

key_misses: calls left a 'rehabilitation chair' rather than a massage chair

misses Thai massage context
hallucinations: describes subject performing 'self-massage or stretching exercise' (he is posing/demonstrating, not self-massaging)
calls the throw a 'blanket draped over his legs'
judgments.justification: Gets the diptych structure and main equipment right but misinterprets activity as self-massage and entirely misses the Thai bamboo massage specialty, the therapist identity, and the bamboo material.

key_hits: correctly identifies same bald man in both photos
EXPLICITLY identifies bamboo rollers ('wooden massage tools (bamboo rollers)')
correctly identifies mobile massage chair (left) vs stationary massage table (right)
explicitly identifies subject as 'massage therapist or wellness professional'
correctly identifies rolled towels, blue/white towel, potted plant, water bottles
describes Thai/wellness context well
key_misses: does not use the exact phrase 'Thai massage' or 'Thai bamboo stick massage'
mentions wooden tools on table but does not emphasize bamboo as a material beyond parenthetical
hallucinations: minor: describes left image man with blue sneakers in description but right image without restating consistent attire
judgments.justification: Best response of the group — only one to explicitly identify the bamboo rollers and name the subject as a massage therapist. Accurately captures the chair-vs-table contrast and most contextual details. Just falls short of naming Thai massage specifically.
